micro.purpose: Diagram labels from 9px through 16px, assigned by role.

motion.name: route-arrival
motion.purpose: One initial drawing of the hero routes.

motion.name: control-response
motion.purpose: Hover and focus response on controls.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Square high-contrast action with a directional arrow.
components.css: .button--primary { min-height: 52px; padding: 0 18px; background: #101217; color: #fff; } .button--primary:hover { background: #175cff; transform: translateY(-2px); }

components.name: Route Station
components.description: White-centered circular node whose stroke owns the route color.
components.css: .station { width: 20px; height: 20px; border: 6px solid currentColor; border-radius: 999px; background: #fff; } .station--ai { color: #175cff; }

narrative.overview: A minimalist wayfinding system for two engineering practices that meet at production. Real evidence is encoded as stations, traces, and platform diagrams.
keyCharacteristics: Cobalt Applied AI route and near-black Frontend route
Square operational surfaces with circular stations
One Cyrillic sans family with decisive hierarchy

rules.name: The Route Ownership Rule
rules.body: Cobalt marks Applied AI or production convergence; it is not generic emphasis.

rules.name: The One Voice Rule
rules.body: Use one type family and build hierarchy with scale, weight, and measure.

dos: Attach every route graphic to real meaning.
Reorganize diagrams for mobile instead of shrinking them.
donts: Do not use cream, terracotta, serif display type, gradients, glow, or decorative grids.
Do not structure pages as repeated same-size cards.
